$comment: Phillips Adapter Flight 1 — reviewed source packet for NY080126 lot 22. This manifest binds the exact URLs and PDF SHA-256 hashes from the 2026-07-24 implementation order. It contains reviewed FACTS only — no Phillips essays, photography, credentials, cookies, session data, or unrelated lots.

auctionPagePdf.filename: The New York Watch Auction_ XIV Saturday, June 13, 2026.pdf

sale.sale_name: The New York Watch Auction: XIV
sale.$sale_date_rationale: Date printed on the official results file and in the founder-supplied auction-page title. The auction page's separate 'Concluded Jun 14 2026' statement is preserved in source-artifact attribution — the two claims are not collapsed and no range is invented.

lot.as_stated_description: An attractive stainless steel chronograph wristwatch with tachymeter scale and bracelet
lot.attributed_summary: Phillips-attributed catalogue facts: year 1960, Switzerland; movement number 17'301'309; manual calibre 321, 17 jewels; stainless steel; Omega ladder bracelet, endlinks stamped 6, maximum overall length 200 mm; Omega deployant clasp reference 7912, stamped 3.63; diameter printed by Phillips as 39.5mmm (as-printed source-text anomaly, not a measured dimension); case, dial, movement, and bracelet signed; described by Phillips as original and well preserved, with a likely original Omega crystal and prior Phillips provenance.

result.$price_basis_authority: The official results PDF states its US-dollar prices include the buyer's premium and are rounded to the nearest dollar.

results_pdf.attribution_note: Official Phillips results file auctionResultsFile_NY080126.pdf for sale NY080126, published from the auction page. Prices in USD include buyer's premium, rounded to the nearest dollar (per the file's own statement).
results_pdf.omission_statement: Full PDF not retained (metadata_only). Only the reviewed lot-22 result row and the premium statement were used.

auction_page_pdf.attribution_note: Founder-supplied browser print of the Phillips auction page for NY080126. The page states 'Concluded Jun 14 2026'; the official results file is dated 2026-06-13. sale_date stores the results-file date; the two dated claims are preserved separately, not collapsed.
auction_page_pdf.omission_statement: Full PDF not retained (metadata_only). Image-based print; catalogue essay and photography deliberately not captured.

lot_page.attribution_note: Phillips lot page for NY080126 lot 22 (object 229882). Facts were manually reviewed from the source packet; an anonymous fetch of this URL validates their presence and records the page's content hash at plan time.
lot_page.omission_statement: Page HTML not retained (metadata_only). Catalogue essay, condition report, and photography deliberately not captured.
